Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************************

 Local equivalences and monads

 One core theorem in the formal theory of monads is about the interaction between a
 duality involution and monads. More specifically, Theorem 12 in the paper 'The formal
 theory of monads' by Ross Street says that whenever a bicategory `B` has a duality
 involution and Eilenberg-Moore objects, then the bicategory `B^co` (2-cells reversed)
 also has Eilenberg-Moore objects. If we instantiate this theorem to the bicategory
 of categories (whose duality involution is given by the opposite category), then we
 see that the Eilenberg-Moore category for a comonad can be constructed via the
 Eilenberg-Moore category for a monad. Concretely, if we have a comonad `C` on a
 category `C`, then we obtain a monad `M` on the opposite category `C^op`.

 One of the intermediate steps of this theorem is proving the universal property of
 the Eilenberg-Moore object. To do so, we show that the natural functor between the
 hom-categories is an adjoint equivalence. As an intermediate step, we construct an
 adjoint equivalence between `hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) (psfunctor_on_monad F m)`
 and `hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m`.

 When we use this theorem, we have a duality involution. Since every duality
 involution also is a local equivalence, all the material in this file can be reused.

 References
 - The formal theory of monads, Ross Street

 Contents
 1. Action on objects
 2. Action on morphisms
 3. The functor between the hom categories
 4. The functor is faithful
 5. The functor is full
 6. The functor is essentially surjective
 7. The adjoint equivalence

 ************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.MonadsLax.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.Examples.PsfunctorOnMonad.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Properties.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.LocalEquivalenceProperties.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.MonadInclusion.

Local Open Scope cat.

Opaque local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
  local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp
  local_equivalence_inv_twocell.

Section LocalEquivalenceMonad.
  Context {B₁ B₂ : bicat}
          (HB₁ : is_univalent_2_1 B₁)
          (HB₂ : is_univalent_2_1 B₂)
          {F : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
          (HF : local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F)
          (m : mnd B₁)
          (x : B₁).

  Let Fm : mnd B₂ := psfunctor_on_mnd F m.

  (** * 1. Action on objects *)
  Section Ob.
    Context (f : mnd_incl B₂ (F x) --> Fm).

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B₁ x) m

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B₁ x) m

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
B₁ ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
?f · endo_of_mnd m ==>
endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) · ?f

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
B₁ ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x), ob_of_mnd m ⟧
 exact (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
· endo_of_mnd m ==>
endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
· local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 exact ((_ ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF _)
               • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF _ _)^-1
               • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor _))
               • linvunitor _).
    Defined.

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
mnd_mor_laws local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
linvunitor (pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data)
• (unit_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
   ▹ pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data)
 • (pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• pr2 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data
B₁, B₂: bicat

f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
((((lassociator (pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data)
      (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • (pr2 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data
       ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
       (pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data)
       (endo_of_mnd m))
  • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
     ◃ pr2 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
     (pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data))

   ▹ pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data) =
(pr1 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• pr2 local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data

  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF

          (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
       ^-1)
    • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
   • linvunitor
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
(((rinvunitor
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
  • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
         (endo_of_mnd m)))
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (mnd_mor_endo f)

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) = ?b

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

  ((rinvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    • (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ unit_of_mnd Fm))
   • mnd_mor_endo f) =
(((rinvunitor
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
  • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF

         (endo_of_mnd m)))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_id HF (ob_of_mnd m)
• (unit_of_mnd m
   • local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
       (endo_of_mnd m)) = ?t2

• local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
    (id₁ (ob_of_mnd m)) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (psfunctor_id F (ob_of_mnd m))

                (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
    • rassociator (id₁ x)
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) (endo_of_mnd m))
   • lunitor
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f) · endo_of_mnd m))
  • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
         (endo_of_mnd m)))
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
    (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
(((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
  • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
         (endo_of_mnd m)))
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
    (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
lassociator
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)

            • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                  (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
               • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
                   (mnd_mor_endo f
                    • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))) =
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))

  • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF

         (endo_of_mnd m)))

• local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
    (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?t2

             (mnd_mor_endo f)
           • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
               (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
      • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
          (mnd_mor_endo f))) = ?t2

f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
(mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • mnd_mor_endo f) = ?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f = ?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
p:= mnd_mor_mu f: ((((lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd Fm) (endo_of_mnd Fm)
    • (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd Fm))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd Fm))
  • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
     ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
   ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f) =
(mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ mult_of_mnd Fm)
• mnd_mor_endo f
((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f = ?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
p:= mnd_mor_mu f: ((((lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
    • (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   • rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
  • (id₁ (F x) ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
 • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f) =
(mor_of_mnd_mor f
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)
      (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mult_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f
((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f = ?t2

x: B₁

  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))

      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))

               ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))))) =
(mor_of_mnd_mor f
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)

((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f = ?t2

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧

  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)) • mnd_mor_endo f)) =
(mor_of_mnd_mor f
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)
      (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mult_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : mor_of_mnd_mor f
         · (# F (endo_of_mnd m)
            · # F (endo_of_mnd m)) ==>
         id₁ (F x) · mor_of_mnd_mor f,
   rassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • z) p: (λ z : mor_of_mnd_mor f
       · (# F (endo_of_mnd m)
          · # F (endo_of_mnd m)) ==>
       id₁ (F x) · mor_of_mnd_mor f,
 rassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) • z)
  (lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ((lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
          ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)) • mnd_mor_endo f))) =
(λ z : mor_of_mnd_mor f
       · (# F (endo_of_mnd m)
          · # F (endo_of_mnd m)) ==>
       id₁ (F x) · mor_of_mnd_mor f,
 rassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) • z)
  ((mor_of_mnd_mor f
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)
         (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mult_of_mnd m)))
   • mnd_mor_endo f)
((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f = ?t2

(mor_of_mnd_mor f
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)
      (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mult_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f
q: ((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))) • mnd_mor_endo f =
(rassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (mor_of_mnd_mor f
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)
         (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mult_of_mnd m))))
• mnd_mor_endo f
((mnd_mor_endo f ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• mnd_mor_endo f = ?t2

          exact q.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
lassociator
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) · endo_of_mnd m
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (endo_of_mnd m))
       ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
           (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
      • (((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
             (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
          ^-1
          ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
              (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
         • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f · # F (endo_of_mnd m))
               (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
            • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
                ((rassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                    (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
                    (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • (mor_of_mnd_mor f
                     ◃ (psfunctor_comp F
                          (endo_of_mnd m)
                          (endo_of_mnd m)
                        • ## F (mult_of_mnd m))))
                 • mnd_mor_endo f))))) =
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
      • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
          (mnd_mor_endo f)))

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

x: B₁

    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m)))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF

    ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF

           (# F (endo_of_mnd m))))
   • (((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

             (# F (endo_of_mnd m))

            (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

          (mor_of_mnd_mor f
           ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)
                (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mult_of_mnd m))))) =
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ mult_of_mnd m)

        (endo_of_mnd m))

 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m)
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
         (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
       ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1)
      • ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m))) =
id₂ (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
(endo_of_mnd m
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m)
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
         (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
       ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1)
      • ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
?b = id₂ (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)

 ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF

((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m)
  ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))

   ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m) = ?t2

 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• (endo_of_mnd m
   ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1) =

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m)

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

endo_of_mnd m ◃ id₂ (endo_of_mnd m) =
id₂ (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)

        apply lwhisker_id2.
    Qed.

    Opaque local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp.

x: B₁

f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧

x: B₁

x: B₁

f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
 exact local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
mnd_mor_laws local_equivalence_mnd_ob_data
 exact local_equivalence_mnd_ob_laws.
    Defined.
  End Ob.

  (** * 2. Action on morphisms *)
  Section Mor.
    Context {f g : mnd_incl B₂ (F x) --> Fm}
            (τ : f ==> g).

    Definition local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor_data
      : mnd_cell_data
          (local_equivalence_mnd_ob f)
          (local_equivalence_mnd_ob g)
      := local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell τ).

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
is_mnd_cell local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
is_mnd_cell local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor_data

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
((((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1)
  • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
      (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
 • linvunitor
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• (id₁ x
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
       (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• ((((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor g)
      ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
          (endo_of_mnd m))
     • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
       ^-1)
    • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (mnd_mor_endo g • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor g)))
   • linvunitor
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor g)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (linvunitor
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         • (id₁ x
            ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
                (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))))) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor g)
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
      • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
           (mnd_mor_endo g
            • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor g))
         • linvunitor
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
                (mor_of_mnd_mor g)))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (linvunitor
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         • (id₁ x
            ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
                (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))))) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
?b =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor g)
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
      • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
           (mnd_mor_endo g
            • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor g))
         • linvunitor
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
                (mor_of_mnd_mor g)))))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (linvunitor
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

                (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))))) = ?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat

x: B₁

f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
linvunitor
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (id₁ x
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
       (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)) = ?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
linvunitor
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
    (cell_of_mnd_cell τ) ⋆⋆ id₂ (id₁ x) = ?t2

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
• linvunitor
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
           (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
         • linvunitor
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
                (mor_of_mnd_mor g))))) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor g)
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
      • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
           (mnd_mor_endo g
            • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor g))
         • linvunitor
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
                (mor_of_mnd_mor g)))))

        (endo_of_mnd m))

mnd_mor_endo f • (id₁ (F x) ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell τ) =

?t2

        apply local_equivalence_inv_twocell_comp.

τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (cell_of_mnd_cell τ ▹ endo_of_mnd Fm) =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))) ^-1
• ((local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
      (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (cell_of_mnd_cell τ ▹ endo_of_mnd Fm) =
((is_invertible_2cell_inv
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))) ^-1
 • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
      (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (# F (endo_of_mnd m))))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (cell_of_mnd_cell τ ▹ endo_of_mnd Fm)
• (is_invertible_2cell_inv
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))) ^-1 =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (cell_of_mnd_cell τ ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
    (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) =
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) =
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_mnd_ob f ==>
local_equivalence_mnd_ob g

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_mnd_ob f ==>
local_equivalence_mnd_ob g

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
mnd_cell_data (local_equivalence_mnd_ob f)
  (local_equivalence_mnd_ob g)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
is_mnd_cell ?τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
mnd_cell_data (local_equivalence_mnd_ob f)
  (local_equivalence_mnd_ob g)
 exact local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor_data.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: f ==> g
is_mnd_cell local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor_data
 exact local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor_laws.
    Defined.
  End Mor.

  Arguments local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor_data {f g} τ /.

  (** * 3. The functor *)
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm)
  (hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm)
  (hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm → hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
∏ a b : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm,
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm → hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
 exact local_equivalence_mnd_ob.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
∏ a b : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm,
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd_ob a,
  local_equivalence_mnd_ob b ⟧
 exact @local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor.
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_functor local_equivalence_mnd_data

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_functor local_equivalence_mnd_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_idax local_equivalence_mnd_data
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_compax local_equivalence_mnd_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_idax local_equivalence_mnd_data
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
# local_equivalence_mnd_data (id₁ f) =
id₁ (local_equivalence_mnd_data f)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (id₂ (pr1 f)) =
id₂
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

      apply local_equivalence_inv_twocell_id.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_compax local_equivalence_mnd_data
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g, h: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
θ: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ g, h ⟧
# local_equivalence_mnd_data (τ · θ) =
# local_equivalence_mnd_data τ
· # local_equivalence_mnd_data θ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g, h: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
θ: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ g, h ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (pr1 τ • pr1 θ) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
    (cell_of_mnd_cell θ)

      apply local_equivalence_inv_twocell_comp.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟶ hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟶ hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm)
  (hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_functor ?F

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
functor_data (hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm)
  (hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m)
 exact local_equivalence_mnd_data.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_functor local_equivalence_mnd_data
 exact local_equivalence_mnd_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 4. The functor is faithful *)
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
faithful local_equivalence_mnd

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
faithful local_equivalence_mnd

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (hfiber
     (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
      # local_equivalence_mnd f0) τ)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (hfiber
     (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
      # local_equivalence_mnd f0) τ)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁, θ₂: hfiber
  (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
   # local_equivalence_mnd f0) τ
θ₁ = θ₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hfiber
  (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
   # local_equivalence_mnd f0) τ
θ₁,, p₁ = θ₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₂ = τ
θ₁,, p₁ = θ₂,, p₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₂ = τ
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
   (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
    # local_equivalence_mnd f0) x0 = τ)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₂ = τ
pr1 (θ₁,, p₁) = pr1 (θ₂,, p₂)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₂ = τ
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
   (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
    # local_equivalence_mnd f0) x0 = τ)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₂ = τ
x0: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
isaprop (# local_equivalence_mnd x0 = τ)

      apply cellset_property.

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm

local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: # local_equivalence_mnd θ₂ = τ
pr1 (θ₁,, p₁) = pr1 (θ₂,, p₂)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₂ = τ
θ₁ = θ₂

    
B₁, B₂: bicat

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂

local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧

θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₂ = τ

B₁, B₂: bicat

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

B₁, B₂: bicat

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧

θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₂ = τ
local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) • cell_of_mnd_cell θ₁ =
local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) • cell_of_mnd_cell θ₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧

θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₂ = τ
(local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
   (mor_of_mnd_mor f) • cell_of_mnd_cell θ₁)
• (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) ^-1 =

   (mor_of_mnd_mor f) • cell_of_mnd_cell θ₂)

     (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) ^-1

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧

  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) ^-1

      is_iso.

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₂ = τ
(local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
   (mor_of_mnd_mor f) • cell_of_mnd_cell θ₁)
• (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) ^-1 =

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₂ = τ
## F
  (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (cell_of_mnd_cell θ₁)) =
## F
  (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (cell_of_mnd_cell θ₂))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
θ₁: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₁: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₁ = τ
θ₂: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
p₂: local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor θ₂ = τ
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell θ₁) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF (cell_of_mnd_cell θ₂)

    exact (maponpaths cell_of_mnd_cell (p₁ @ !p₂)).
  Qed.

  (** * 5. The functor is full *)
  Section Fullness.
    Context {f g : mnd_incl B₂ (F x) --> Fm}
            (τ : local_equivalence_mnd f --> local_equivalence_mnd g).

    Definition full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data
      : mnd_cell_data f g
      := (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))^-1
         • ##F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
         • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor g).

    Arguments full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data /.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
is_mnd_cell full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
is_mnd_cell full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
mnd_mor_endo f
• (id₁ (F x)
   ◃ (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
       • ## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
      • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor g))) =
((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
   • ## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
  • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• mnd_mor_endo g

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd f)
         · endo_of_mnd m ==>
         id₁ (ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
         · mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd g),
   z
   • lunitor
       (mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd g)))
  (mnd_cell_endo τ): (λ z : mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd f)
       · endo_of_mnd m ==>
       id₁ (ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
       · mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd g),
 z
 • lunitor
     (mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd g)))
  (mnd_mor_endo (local_equivalence_mnd f)
   • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
      ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell τ)) =
(λ z : mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd f)
       · endo_of_mnd m ==>
       id₁ (ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
       · mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd g),
 z
 • lunitor
     (mor_of_mnd_mor (local_equivalence_mnd g)))
  ((cell_of_mnd_cell τ ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • mnd_mor_endo (local_equivalence_mnd g))
mnd_mor_endo f
• (id₁ (F x)
   ◃ (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
       • ## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
      • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor g))) =
((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
   • ## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
  • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• mnd_mor_endo g

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f) · endo_of_mnd m ==>
         id₁ x
         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
             (mor_of_mnd_mor g),
   z
   • lunitor
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor g))) (mnd_cell_endo τ): (((((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
         (endo_of_mnd m))
    • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
      ^-1)
   • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
       (mnd_mor_endo f
        • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • linvunitor
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
 • (id₁ x ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
• lunitor
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) =
((cell_of_mnd_cell τ ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
 • ((((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor g)
       ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
           (endo_of_mnd m))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧

   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   ^-1

        (mnd_mor_endo f
         • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • cell_of_mnd_cell τ)) =
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

     (endo_of_mnd m))

      ^-1

          (mnd_mor_endo g
           • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor g))))
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f) · endo_of_mnd m ==>
         local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
           (mor_of_mnd_mor g),

      (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   ^-1

       (mnd_mor_endo g

• (id₁ (F x)
   ◃ (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧

   (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (mnd_mor_endo f • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • cell_of_mnd_cell τ) =
(cell_of_mnd_cell τ
 ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor g) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   ^-1
   • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
       (mnd_mor_endo g
        • lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor g)))
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor g))

   ^-1)

## F

        (# F (endo_of_mnd m))))

      apply id2_right.
    Qed.

    Opaque local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp.

x: B₁

local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
f ==> g

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
f ==> g

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
mnd_cell_data f g
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
is_mnd_cell ?τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
mnd_cell_data f g
 exact full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
is_mnd_cell full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data
 exact full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_laws.
    Defined.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor
  full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell = τ

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_mnd_data_mor
  full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell = τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
    • ## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
   • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
       (mor_of_mnd_mor g)) = cell_of_mnd_cell τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
   • (## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ)
      • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor g))) = cell_of_mnd_cell τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
   • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
       (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
          (mor_of_mnd_mor g))) = cell_of_mnd_cell τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
     (## F (cell_of_mnd_cell τ))
   • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
           (mor_of_mnd_mor g))) ^-1) =
cell_of_mnd_cell τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
• ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ^-1 • cell_of_mnd_cell τ) =
cell_of_mnd_cell τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
   (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
 • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ^-1)
• cell_of_mnd_cell τ = cell_of_mnd_cell τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
   (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
 • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ^-1)
• cell_of_mnd_cell τ =
id₂
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• cell_of_mnd_cell τ

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ^-1 =
id₂
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ^-1 = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
?b =
id₂
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ^-1 = ?b

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1 = ?y'

        exact (local_equivalence_counit_triangle_inv HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: mnd B₂ ⟦ mnd_incl B₂ (F x), Fm ⟧
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) ^-1 =
id₂
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

      apply vcomp_rinv.
    Qed.
  End Fullness.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
full local_equivalence_mnd

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
full local_equivalence_mnd

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
∥ hfiber
    (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
     # local_equivalence_mnd f0) τ ∥

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
(λ x0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
 (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
  # local_equivalence_mnd f0) x0 = τ) ?pr1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧
 exact (full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell τ).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f, g: hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
τ: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m ⟦ local_equivalence_mnd f,
local_equivalence_mnd g ⟧
(λ x0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
 (λ f0 : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm ⟦ f, g ⟧,
  # local_equivalence_mnd f0) x0 = τ)
  (full_local_equivalence_mnd_cell τ)
 exact (full_local_equivalence_mnd_eq τ).
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
fully_faithful local_equivalence_mnd

B₁, B₂: bicat

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
faithful local_equivalence_mnd
 exact faithful_local_equivalence_mnd.
  Qed.

  (** * 6. The functor is essentially surjective *)
  Section EssentiallySurjective.
    Context (f : mnd_incl B₁ x --> m).

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
mnd_mor_data (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
B₂ ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)), ob_of_mnd Fm ⟧
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?f · endo_of_mnd Fm ==>
endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) · ?f

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
B₂ ⟦ ob_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)), ob_of_mnd Fm ⟧
 exact (#F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) · endo_of_mnd Fm ==>
endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
· # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 exact (psfunctor_comp F _ _
               • ##F(mnd_mor_endo f)
               • (psfunctor_comp F _ _)^-1
               • ((psfunctor_id F _)^-1 ▹ _)).
    Defined.

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
mnd_mor_laws
  essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
linvunitor
  (pr1
     essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data)
• (unit_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
   ▹ pr1
       essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data) =
(rinvunitor
   (pr1
      essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data)
 • (pr1
      essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
    ◃ unit_of_mnd Fm))
• pr2
    essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((lassociator
      (pr1
         essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data)
      (endo_of_mnd Fm) (endo_of_mnd Fm)
    • (pr2
         essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
       ▹ endo_of_mnd Fm))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
       (pr1
          essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data)
       (endo_of_mnd Fm))
  • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
     ◃ pr2
         essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
     (pr1
        essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data))
• (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
   ▹ pr1
       essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data) =
(pr1
   essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
 ◃ mult_of_mnd Fm)
• pr2
    essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data

     essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data)

   ▹ pr1

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
linvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (id₂ (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
(rinvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ (psfunctor_id F (ob_of_mnd m)
       • ## F (unit_of_mnd m))))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      ^-1)
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
linvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
(rinvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ (psfunctor_id F (ob_of_mnd m)
       • ## F (unit_of_mnd m))))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      ^-1)
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

 • (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ (psfunctor_id F (ob_of_mnd m)
       • ## F (unit_of_mnd m))))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

linvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

x: B₁

 • (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

       • ## F (unit_of_mnd m))))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      ^-1)

(rinvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ (psfunctor_id F (ob_of_mnd m)
       • ## F (unit_of_mnd m))))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(rinvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • ((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     ◃ psfunctor_id F (ob_of_mnd m))
    • (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (unit_of_mnd m))))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
rinvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    ◃ psfunctor_id F (ob_of_mnd m))
   • ((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (unit_of_mnd m))
      • (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m)
         • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
               • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                  ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))) = 
?b

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (unit_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1
         • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
            ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))) = ?t2

x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (unit_of_mnd m))
   • psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m)) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =

x: B₁

(((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (id₁ (ob_of_mnd m))
   • ## F (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
  • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
  (id₁ (ob_of_mnd m))
• (## F (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)
   • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1
         • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
            ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))) = ?t2

            apply idpath.

  ((rinvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    • (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
   • mnd_mor_endo f) = ?y'

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(rinvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 • (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• mnd_mor_endo f = ?t2

          exact (!(mnd_mor_unit f)).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(## F
   (linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    • (unit_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
linvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧

   (linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
    • (id₂ (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
linvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧

linvunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv
        (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
        (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id F x))))
  ^-1

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧

• ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧

 • (psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
