## F (linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

        apply idpath.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((lassociator
      (pr1
         essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data)
      (endo_of_mnd Fm) (endo_of_mnd Fm)
    • (pr2
         essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
       ▹ endo_of_mnd Fm))
   • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
       (pr1
          essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data)
       (endo_of_mnd Fm))
  • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
     ◃ pr2
         essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)))
     (pr1
        essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data))
• (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₂ (F x))
   ▹ pr1
       essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data) =
(pr1
   essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
 ◃ mult_of_mnd Fm)
• pr2
    essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
    • ((((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
        • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
       ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   • rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
  • (id₁ (F x)
     ◃ (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
        • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))
 • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
     (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • ## F (mult_of_mnd m)))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      ^-1)
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
    • ((((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
            ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
        • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
           ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
       • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))))
   • rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
  • (id₁ (F x)
     ◃ (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
        • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))
 • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
     (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
    • ## F (mult_of_mnd m)))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      ^-1)
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
    • ((((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
            ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
        • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
           ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
       • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))))
   • rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
  • ((((id₁ (F x)
        ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m))
       • (id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f)))
      • (id₁ (F x)
         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1))
     • (id₁ (F x)
        ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))
 • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
     (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
  ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (mult_of_mnd m)))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      ^-1)
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))))))) =
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (mult_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (mult_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) =
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (mult_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?b =
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (mult_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (mult_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1
         • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
            ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))) = ?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) ◃ ## F (mult_of_mnd m))
   • psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       (endo_of_mnd m)) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)
   • ## F (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ mult_of_mnd m))
  • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
  (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)
• (## F (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
   • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1

            ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))) = ?t2

• (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
   • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

         ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) = ?t2

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((## F (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
  • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
## F (mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ mult_of_mnd m)
• ## F (mnd_mor_endo f) = ?y'

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
## F
  ((mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • mnd_mor_endo f) =
?y'

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(mor_of_mnd_mor f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • mnd_mor_endo f =
?t2

          exact (!(mnd_mor_mu f)).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)
   • ((## F
         (((((lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
              • (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
             • rassociator
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
               ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
           • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
               (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          • (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
             ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1)
      • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
         ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) =
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)
   • (((((((## F
              (lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                 (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
            • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
           • ## F
               (rassociator
                  (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)))
          • ## F
              (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
               ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ## F
             (lassociator
                (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
        • ## F
            (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
             ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1)
      • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
         ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) =
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)
   • (((((((## F
              (lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                 (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
            • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
           • ## F
               (rassociator
                  (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)))
          • ## F
              (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
               ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ## F
             (lassociator
                (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
        • ## F
            (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
             ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1)
      • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
         ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?b =
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m)
   • (((((((## F
              (lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                 (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
            • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
           • ## F
               (rassociator
                  (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)))
          • ## F
              (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
               ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ## F
             (lassociator
                (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
        • ## F
            (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
             ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1)
      • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
         ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(((((((((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m)
             (endo_of_mnd m))
        • psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m))
       • ## F
           (lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
              (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)))
      • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
     • ## F
         (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
            (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)))
    • ## F
        (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
   • ## F
       (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
          (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • ## F
      (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
  ◃ psfunctor_comp F (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m))
 • psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m · endo_of_mnd m))
• ## F
    (lassociator (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)
       (endo_of_mnd m)) = ?y'

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
• psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
    (endo_of_mnd m) = ?y'

          apply idpath.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((((((lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
        • (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
             (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m)))
       • psfunctor_comp F
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
     • ## F
         (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
            (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)))
    • ## F
        (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
   • ## F
       (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
          (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • ## F
      (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
         • (## F
              (rassociator
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (## F
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
                  ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
               • (## F
                    (lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                       (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • (## F
                       (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
                        ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                     • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                           (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                        • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))))) =
lassociator (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      (endo_of_mnd m) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
          ^-1 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
              ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
             ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
            • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                 (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ psfunctor_comp F
                       (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                       (endo_of_mnd m))
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
                     • ((id₁ (F x)
                         ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                        • ((id₁ (F x)
                            ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                               ▹ # F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                           • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                                (id₁ (F x))
                                (# F
                                   (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                              • (lunitor (id₁ ...)
                                 ▹ # F
                                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• (## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F
        (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (## F
           (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
            ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
                  ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
(## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
    ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
        ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (rassociator (id₁ (F x))
           (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
           (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
                 (endo_of_mnd m))
            • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                        (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                         ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                     • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                          (id₁ (F x))
                          (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                        • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• (## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F
        (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (## F
           (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
            ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)

              (lassociator
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))

                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F

                  ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)

                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?b =
(## F (mnd_mor_endo f) ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
    ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
        ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
       ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))

                 (endo_of_mnd m))

               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                        (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
                  • ((id₁ (F x)
                      ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                         ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                     • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                          (id₁ (F x))
                          (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                        • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((((psfunctor_comp F
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
        (endo_of_mnd m)
      • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
     • ## F
         (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
            (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m)))
    • ## F

          (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • ## F

 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂

x: B₁

      • psfunctor_comp F

  • ## F

 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =

                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =

• (((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
    ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))

        ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
psfunctor_comp F
  (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• (## F
     (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (## F
        (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
      • (## F
           (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
              (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         • (## F

               ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
               • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                  ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
    ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
        (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ((id₁ (F x)
          ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
              (endo_of_mnd m))
         • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
            • ((id₁ (F x)
                ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
               • ((id₁ (F x)
                   ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                      ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
                  • (lassociator (id₁ (F x))
                       (id₁ (F x))
                       (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                     • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                        ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))
^-1
• (psfunctor_comp F
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x) · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F
        (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (## F
           (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
            ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                 (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x))
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (mult_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
                  ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (F x)
                ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
               • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
                    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F
        (rassociator (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (F x)
                ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
               • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
                    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F
        (rassociator (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?b =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (F x)
                ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
               • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
                    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
     (endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F
        (rassociator (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(((((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
       ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
          (endo_of_mnd m))
     • ## F
         (rassociator (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m)))
    • ## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
   • ## F
       (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • ## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((((rassociator (# F (id₁ x))
        (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
      • (# F (id₁ x)
         ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
             (endo_of_mnd m)))
     • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
         (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m))
    • ## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
   • ## F
       (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • ## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
?b

          apply idpath.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (F x)
                ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
               • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
                    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m))
      • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
            • ((id₁ (F x)
                ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
               • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
                    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))) =
rassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((# F (id₁ x)
    ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
      • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
         • (## F
              (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (## F
                 (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
               • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                  • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))

x: B₁

 ▹ # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• (rassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
     (# F (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

        ^-1))
  • (id₁ (F x)
     ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
        ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))
 • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
     (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =

x: B₁

     (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

   • ((id₁ (F x)

                     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) · # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
      • ((id₁ (F x)
          ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
            • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
               • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                  ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))) =
(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
      • (## F
           (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
               • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                  ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂

((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) · # F (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
      • ((id₁ (F x)
          ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
         • ((id₁ (F x)
             ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
            • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
               • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
                  ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))) = 
?b

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?b =
(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) (endo_of_mnd m))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
   • (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
      • (## F
           (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
               • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                  ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?b =
(# F (id₁ x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
• (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
    ▹ # F (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1)
      • ((id₁ (F x)
          ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
             ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
         • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
              (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
  (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
• (## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) = ?b

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
      (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)
    • ## F (id₁ x ◃ mnd_mor_endo f))
   • ## F
       (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • ## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?b

• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (id₁ x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) =
(# F (id₁ x) ◃ ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
• (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
    ▹ # F (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • ((id₁ (F x)
       ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1)
      • ((id₁ (F x)
          ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
             ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
         • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
              (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
• (## F
     (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         ^-1
         • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
            ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
 ▹ # F (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      ^-1)

           (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
         • (lunitor (id₁ (F x))
            ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))

• (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
    ▹ # F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

     (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
 ▹ # F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
        (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ x))
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))
^-1
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))

x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
 ▹ # F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
  ▹ # F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (id₁ (F x)
    ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))
• lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) = ?y'

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
 ▹ # F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((id₁ (F x)
    ◃ ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
   • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (id₁ (F x))
       (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) = ?y'

x: B₁

 ▹ # F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (id₁ x))
     (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
      ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) = ?y'

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
  ▹ # F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • lassociator (id₁ (F x)) (# F (id₁ x))
     (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) = ?y'

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
   (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x))
    ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) = ?y'

          apply idpath.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
 • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
    ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) =
((lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
 • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
    ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
• (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) = ?b

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
?b =
((lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
    (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x))
     ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
 • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
    ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(# F (id₁ x)
 ◃ psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f)
   • (## F
        (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
           (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(((((# F (id₁ x)
     ◃ psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
    • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
        (id₁ x · mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • ## F
       (lassociator (id₁ x) (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
  • ## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)

?b

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
      (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
    • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
       ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
   • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x · id₁ x)
       (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
  • ## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?b

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
lassociator (# F (id₁ x)) (# F (id₁ x))
  (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x · id₁ x)
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
      • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
               (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
            • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
               ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))) = ?b

          apply idpath.

    ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))

        (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

   • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x) ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor f)

• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
id₂ (# F (id₁ x) · # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) =
?t2

          apply id2_left.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• ((## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x))
 ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
• (((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
    ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
   • (lunitor (id₁ (F x)) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
 • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1))
▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f) =
(((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x))
 • ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
    • lunitor (id₁ (F x)))) ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
• (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1) =
((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ x))
• ((id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
   • lunitor (id₁ (F x)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (# F (id₁ x))
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv (psfunctor_id F x))) ^-1
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
   • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)) =
(id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
• lunitor (id₁ (F x))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
   • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)) =
(id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
• lunitor (id₁ (F x))

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

(psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
   • (## F (lunitor (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)) =
?b

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

(((psfunctor_id F x ▹ # F (id₁ x))
  • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
 • ## F (lunitor (id₁ x))) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
lunitor (# F (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 = ?b

          apply idpath.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
lunitor (# F (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(id₁ (F x) ◃ (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
• lunitor (id₁ (F x))

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
lunitor (# F (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
lunitor (# F (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

 exact essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
mnd_mor_laws
  essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_data
 exact essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv_laws.
    Defined.

    Definition essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data
      : mnd_cell_data
          (local_equivalence_mnd essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv)
          f
      := (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (mor_of_mnd_mor f))^-1.

    Arguments essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data /.

x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
mnd_mor_endo
  (local_equivalence_mnd
     essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv)
• (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B₁ x)
   ◃ essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data) =
(essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_cell_data
 ▹ endo_of_mnd m) • mnd_mor_endo f

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
((((local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
      (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
    ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (endo_of_mnd m))
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
        (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
     ^-1)
  • local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
      ((((psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
            (endo_of_mnd m) • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
         • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
        • ((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
           ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
       • lunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))
 • linvunitor
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))
• (id₁ x
   ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
        (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1) =
((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
    (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• mnd_mor_endo f

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
   (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m)
         • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
               • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • lunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))
      • (linvunitor
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
              (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
         • (id₁ x
            ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
                 (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)))) =
((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
    (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• mnd_mor_endo f

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
   (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp HF
      (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (psfunctor_comp F (mor_of_mnd_mor f)
           (endo_of_mnd m)
         • (## F (mnd_mor_endo f)
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ x)
                  (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
               • (((psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
                   ▹ # F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
                  • lunitor (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))))))
      • ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
         • linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) = ?b

         (((## F

                 (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
               ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
                    (endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1)
            • ## F
                ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
                    (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
                 ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
           • ## F (mnd_mor_endo f))
          • ## F (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))
       • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1)
      • linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f))) =
((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
    (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• mnd_mor_endo f

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

m: mnd B₁
x: B₁

f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
   (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
 ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF (endo_of_mnd m))
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
        (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
      · local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
          (# F (endo_of_mnd m)))
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell HF
        (## F
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell HF
              (# F (mor_of_mnd_mor f))
            ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
                 (endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1)

               • ## F (lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))))
      • ((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
            (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1
         • linvunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor f)))) =
((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
    (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• mnd_mor_endo f

              (mor_of_mnd_mor f · endo_of_mnd m)) ^-1))) =
?b

x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (cell_of_mnd_cell
     essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_cell)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: mnd B₁ ⟦ mnd_incl B₁ x, m ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell HF
     (mor_of_mnd_mor f)) ^-1

        is_iso.
    Defined.
  End EssentiallySurjective.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
essentially_surjective local_equivalence_mnd

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
essentially_surjective local_equivalence_mnd

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
∃ a : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm,
z_iso (local_equivalence_mnd a) f

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
(λ a : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm,
 z_iso (local_equivalence_mnd a) f) ?pr1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm
 exact (essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv f).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
(λ a : hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm,
 z_iso (local_equivalence_mnd a) f)
  (essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv f)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
f: hom (mnd_incl B₁ x) m
invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_mnd
     (essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv
        f)) f

      exact (essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd_inv2cell f).
  Defined.

  (** * 7. The adjoint equivalence *)
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
adj_equivalence_of_cats local_equivalence_mnd

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
adj_equivalence_of_cats local_equivalence_mnd

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_univalent (hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
fully_faithful local_equivalence_mnd
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
essentially_surjective local_equivalence_mnd

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_univalent (hom (mnd_incl B₂ (F x)) Fm)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_univalent_2_1 (mnd B₂)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
is_univalent_2_1 B₂

      exact HB₂.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
fully_faithful local_equivalence_mnd
 exact fully_faithful_local_equivalence_mnd.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
m: mnd B₁
x: B₁
Fm:= psfunctor_on_mnd F m: mnd B₂
essentially_surjective local_equivalence_mnd
 exact essentially_surjective_local_equivalence_mnd.
  Defined.
End LocalEquivalenceMonad.
